message:
feat: Expand BEADS_CACHE_DIR to SQLite database files

The BEADS_CACHE_DIR environment variable now applies to all transient
files, not just last-touched:
- beads.db
- beads.db-shm (WAL shared memory)
- beads.db-wal (write-ahead log)
- last-touched (already worked)

Changes:
- Added db_path() helper in util/mod.rs
- Updated resolve_db_path() to use resolve_cache_dir() for relative paths
- Updated init.rs to use new db_path() function with cache dir support

This allows storing the database on a fast local filesystem when the
.beads directory is on a slow network mount or read-only location.

Fixes: #35

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
